_howto: Add finished matches under 'matches' keyed by match code (M1..M104, see data/tournament.json). Group match: {"score": [home, away]}. Knockout match drawn after 90/120 min: add "pens": [home, away]. The site computes group tables, third-place ranking, bracket progression and all points. Use 'overrides.groupOrder' only if FIFA tiebreakers beyond points/GD/GF/head-to-head decide a group order, e.g. {"A": ["MEX", "KOR", "RSA", "CZE"]}.
